company.name: Dhaka Logistics Services & Solution
company.tagline: One Point of Contact. Every Operation Covered.
company.description: Since 2010, DLSS has been the operational backbone for Bangladesh's most demanding enterprises — from HR outsourcing to facility management, engineering to fleet telematics.

corporate.label: Corporate Office
corporate.address: H #101B, Road #07 (2nd Floor), New DOHS, Mohakhali, Dhaka-1206

registered.label: Registered Office
registered.address: 24/A, Skylark Point, Bijoy Nagar (4th Floor), Dhaka-1000

company.teamDescription: Our management team is drawn from leading multinational organizations, trained both domestically and internationally in modern management systems. A deliberate combination of practiced skills and contemporary outlook — built to serve enterprise-grade mandates.

about.heroSubtitle: Built on Experience. Driven by Results.
about.whoWeAre:
Dhaka Logistics Services & Solution is a strategic partner to businesses across Bangladesh in Support Services and Logistics Management.

We comprise a highly experienced, dedicated and result-oriented team, supported by an advisory board with expertise drawn from both Government and Non-Government Organizations.

We operate from our Corporate Office in Dhaka with regional presence in Chittagong, Rajshahi, Khulna, and Kushtia — providing strong nationwide coverage.

Our years of operation have given us deep, practical understanding of Bangladesh's socio-economic market — its demands, opportunities, and challenges — at both individual and organizational levels.

vision: We will be the single point of contact to handle all routine and sudden support — freeing managerial time so organizations can focus entirely on strategy, growth and execution.
mission: Ease in all day-to-day problems through support, service and related routine jobs of an Organization.
Free Managerial time so that the Manager is able to fully focus on business growth via determining strategies, planning & execution.
Support the Organization to boost up the organizational efficiency.

missionDetailed.title: Ease Operations
missionDetailed.description: Handle all day-to-day support, service and routine tasks of the organization.

missionDetailed.title: Free Management
missionDetailed.description: Enable managers to fully focus on strategy, planning and execution.

missionDetailed.title: Boost Efficiency
missionDetailed.description: Support the organization in achieving peak operational output.

capabilities.title: Code of Conduct & Labour Law Compliance
capabilities.description: Our team brings strong command of Code of Conduct compliance, Labour law frameworks, Corporate Citizenship, and Payroll Management — with particular depth in Industrial Relations and dispute resolution through CBA negotiations in multinational and local organizations.

capabilities.title: Government Liaison & Regulatory Relations
capabilities.description: We maintain active liaison with law enforcement agencies, government bodies, and regulatory institutions — enabling us to execute mandates efficiently and on time.

capabilities.title: Engineering Excellence
capabilities.description: Our engineering capability is backed by Graduate Engineers from leading institutes including BUET, supporting construction, design, and technical project execution.

capabilities.title: Financial Solvency
capabilities.description: We are financially solvent, operating without primary dependency on financial institutions. Our management averages 15 years of experience — maximum 35 years.

whyDLSS.heading: Why organizations trust DLSS
whyDLSS.body:
We are not a vendor. We are a strategic operations partner. With an advisory board drawn from both government and non-government institutions, and a management team averaging 15 years of experience — maximum 35 years — DLSS brings institutional depth to every engagement.

We maintain a strong liaison with law enforcement, regulatory bodies, and government offices. We are financially solvent, operating without primary dependency on financial institutions.

services.title: Human Resource Outsourcing
services.description: We manage the full people lifecycle for your organization — from sourcing and selection to orientation, service book preparation, government body approvals, and final settlement.
services.accentStat: 532 Sales Officers currently deployed across our client network

services.title: Payroll Management
services.description: DLSS handles complete payroll processing for outsourced workforces — including Provident Fund and Gratuity management — ensuring compliance, accuracy and timeliness regardless of workforce scale.
services.accentStat: 1,133 factory workers on active payroll management

services.title: HR / IR Consultancy & Audit
services.description: Our team brings rare depth in Industrial Relations — including CBA negotiation experience in multinational environments, Labour law compliance audits, and Code of Conduct implementation.
services.accentStat: Strong liaison maintained with law enforcement, government and non-government regulatory bodies

services.title: Logistics Services & Solutions
services.description: We deliver target-oriented logistics and operational support — from field coordination and monitoring to legal support and printing — managing the supply chain of services so your operations never stall.

services.title: Vehicle Tracking & Telematics (VTS)
services.description: Through our partnerships with 3D Tracking and GreenRoad, we deliver real-time fleet visibility, driver behavior coaching, and vehicle safety systems — reducing costs and improving fleet performance for corporate clients.
services.accentStat: Real-time fleet visibility across corporate client networks
services.partnerCallout: 3D Tracking — Global telematics platform, founded Guernsey 2005, UK servers
services.partnerDescription: GreenRoad — Fleet Safety Telematics, founded 2004, in-cab real-time coaching

services.title: Engineering & Construction
services.description: Our engineering team — including Graduate Engineers from BUET — delivers end-to-end construction and infrastructure solutions, from initial design through government permitting and site execution.
services.accentStat: BUET-qualified engineers in the core delivery team

services.title: Facility & Catering Management
services.description: DLSS manages the full facility environment for corporate clients — from canteen operations and food supply to cleaning, janitorial services, and hospitality management.

services.title: Event Management
services.description: In partnership with SalMark, DLSS delivers corporate event management and brand activation — bringing the same operational discipline from our logistics division to every event format.
services.accentStat: Corporate event management and brand activation across industries
services.partnerDescription: Focused on Reducing Costs, Increasing Efficiency, and delivering Better ROI

clients.name: Government of the People's Republic of Bangladesh

partners.name: SalMark
partners.description: Inspired by renowned corporate leaders, SalMark focuses on reducing costs, increasing efficiency, and achieving better ROI through innovative event solutions.

partners.name: Monower Associates
partners.description: Expert HR and management consultancy partner providing strategic advisory for complex organizational challenges.

partners.name: 3D Tracking
partners.description: Global telematics service platform provider, founded in Guernsey in 2005, with UK-based servers. Powers all vehicle tracking and safety system services.

partners.name: GreenRoad
partners.description: Founded in 2004, GreenRoad provides fleet management solutions focused on improving driver behavior through in-cab real-time coaching and driver engagement.

future.title: Integrated Facility Management (IFM)
future.description: DLSS is expanding its service architecture to deliver full Integrated Facility Management — a single managed solution covering every physical and operational need of a corporate facility. From licensing to business execution — under one roof.

jobPosts.title: Senior HR Manager
jobPosts.description: We are seeking an experienced Senior HR Manager to lead our Human Resources division. You will oversee recruitment, employee relations, training & development, and compliance across all DLSS operations. This role requires deep expertise in Labour Law, Code of Conduct, and Industrial Relations within the Bangladesh context.
requirements: 10+ years of HR experience in multinational or enterprise environments
Expert knowledge of Bangladesh Labour Law and Code of Conduct
Proven track record in Industrial Relations and CBA negotiations
Strong leadership and team building capabilities
Proficiency in HRIS systems and payroll platforms
Excellent written and verbal communication skills
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in HR, Business Administration, or related field
CIPD or equivalent HR certification
Experience in outsourcing and payroll management

jobPosts.title: Operations Coordinator
jobPosts.description: Join our growing Operations team as an Operations Coordinator. You'll support the daily logistics operations, resource deployment tracking, and client coordination. Working closely with our regional field teams, you'll ensure seamless execution of all support services across nationwide locations.
requirements: Strong organizational and time management skills
Experience in logistics or operations coordination
Proficiency in MS Office and data management
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
Ability to work under pressure and meet tight deadlines
Problem-solving mindset
qualifications: Bachelors degree in Business, Supply Chain, or related field
2-3 years of experience in operations or logistics

jobPosts.title: Safety Officer (Engineering & Construction)
jobPosts.description: We seek a certified Safety Officer for our Engineering & Construction projects. You will establish and enforce safety protocols, conduct training, perform site inspections, and maintain compliance with Bangladesh building and safety regulations. This role is crucial in ensuring zero-incident project execution.
requirements: Certification in Occupational Health & Safety (OHSAS/ISO 45001)
Knowledge of Bangladesh building codes and regulations
Site inspection and hazard assessment expertise
Strong documentation and reporting skills
Leadership and training capabilities
Physical ability to conduct site visits
qualifications: Diploma or Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering or Safety Management
Valid safety certification from recognized body
3-5 years of experience in construction safety

jobPosts.title: Fleet Manager
jobPosts.description: Manage our growing vehicle fleet and driver coordination network. You'll oversee fleet maintenance, driver management, telematics data analysis, and route optimization. Coordinate with our 3D Tracking and GreenRoad partners for real-time monitoring and safety coaching.
requirements: Experience in fleet or vehicle management
Knowledge of vehicle maintenance and logistics
Proficiency with telematics systems and fleet software
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Leadership experience with driver teams
Attention to safety and compliance
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Logistics, Supply Chain, or related field
Valid driving license and 3-5 years fleet management experience
Knowledge of vehicle telematics platforms

jobPosts.title: Payroll Specialist
jobPosts.description: Execute accurate and timely payroll processing for 2,000+ deployed resources. You'll manage Provident Fund and Gratuity calculations, coordinate with banking partners, and maintain compliance with DNCC and government payroll regulations. Meticulous attention to detail is critical.
requirements: 4+ years of payroll processing experience
Expert knowledge of Bangladesh employment regulations
Proficiency in payroll software and banking systems
Accuracy and attention to detail
Understanding of PF, Gratuity, and wage regulations
Strong numerical aptitude
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
Payroll certification or equivalent training
Experience with large-scale payroll operations

jobPosts.title: Field Coordinator (Chittagong)
jobPosts.description: Be our eyes and ears in Chittagong region. As Field Coordinator, you'll manage on-ground operations, client liaison, resource deployment monitoring, and service quality audits. Regular site visits and communication with regional clients are core responsibilities.
requirements: Strong organizational and communication skills
Experience in regional operations or field management
Ability to build client relationships
Proficiency in data collection and reporting
Own vehicle or reliable transportation
Flexibility for frequent field visits
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Business or related field
2-3 years of field operations or logistics experience
Valid driving license

jobPosts.title: Sales Representative (B2B Services)
jobPosts.description: Drive business growth by promoting DLSS services to corporate clients. You'll identify prospects, conduct presentations, close deals, and maintain client relationships. Target organizations seeking integrated support services across HR, logistics, and facility management.
requirements: 3+ years of B2B sales experience
Track record of closing enterprise-level deals
Strong presentation and negotiation skills
CRM software proficiency
Good understanding of HR, Logistics, and FM services
Excellent communication skills
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Business, Sales, or related field
Proven sales achievement with 3+ years experience
Understanding of Bangladesh business landscape

jobPosts.title: Junior Engineer
jobPosts.description: Support our engineering team in design, planning, and execution of construction projects. You'll work alongside BUET-qualified engineers on civil works, design documentation, site surveys, and government liaison. Ideal for recent graduates seeking hands-on experience.
requirements: Strong understanding of civil engineering principles
AutoCAD or similar design software proficiency
Site surveying and measurement knowledge
Attention to detail and technical accuracy
Willingness to learn and grow
Physical ability for site work
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering from recognized university
Recent graduate (0-2 years experience) or fresher welcome
Basic CAD knowledge preferable
